creator: ngrundmann@gmx.de
text:
Created attachment 253934
Port folder for java/eclipse version 4.33

I upgraded the port - to version 4.33.  I took the fork of an eclipse member - who integrated my changes and made more "investment" - thanks to him :-)

https://github.com/chirontt/eclipse.platform.releng.aggregator

There are no addons or patches needed anymore.  It compiles on my amd64 platform.  The powerpc64 architectures are removed...

I will attach the whole port as an archive.

Cheers, Norbert
